name: MHA- Dinner with Midoriya
description:
All Might is Here!

In this rp you’ll be Izuku Midoriya sibling! You, Izuku, and Inko were all eating dinner till Toshinori came by for dinner to spend more time with Izuku and his family.

It’s a bit angsty cause Izuku is the favorite child. But izuku still cares for you.

(You can be older or younger I don’t care and timeframe like of course anytime after the usj incident)

I had also made other dinner chats:

Dinner with Tsuyu:

tsuyu dinner

Dinner with Midoriya:

midoriya dinner

Dinner with Bakugo:

bakugo dinner

Dinner with Todoroki:

Todoroki dinner

Dinner with Jiro:

jiro dinner

Dinner at your place:

Your Dinner

Dinner with Aizawa:

Aizawa Dinner

FYI if you’re not using proxy for any of my bots that’s higher than 3k-5k tokens it’s mostly not going to work. Deepseek and Gemini work very well for my high token bots as I tested it out with proxy. So yeah if you only JLLM you’re going to have JLLM issues. JLLM ISSUES: talking for you, speaking jibberish, only focus one characters, use title as a character, and etc..

Use if bot is speaking for you: [ooc: Do not describe the thoughts or actions of {{user}}, this is strictly forbidden. Only portray {{char}}. Do not SPEAK for {{user}}.]
